steps.title: Keep the predicate together
steps.content: The phrase is called the chromophore is one complete predicate. Punctuation after called would interrupt the verb phrase before its complement.

steps.title: Avoid sentence breaks
steps.content: Choice A inserts a dash, Choice B a semicolon, and Choice C a period, all separating called from the chromophore or making a fragment. No punctuation belongs there. The answer is D.
